_comment: Card-rebalance valid-from list. When a card is reworked in a patch, list it here so its stats only count from that version forward (its pre-rework data is excluded). Map a card_id to the minimum build_id its current form is valid from, e.g. "CARD.WAR": "v0.101.0". Cards not listed use all their data. Underscore-prefixed keys are notes and are ignored.
